title: CRC Softcover reissue
wikitext:
[]: CRC Softcover reissue             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Apr 12, 2019 10:47 am Can't for the life of me find the 1.0 CRC thread, but it's getting reissued in June without the giant cardboard box or hardcover and with without the storyboards for a mere 3,500 yen. https://akiba-souken.com/article/39529/ Presumably the 2.0 softcover will follow eventually?

[]: Re: CRC Softcover reissue             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri Apr 12, 2019 2:24 pm Holy shit. Gotta get that. Not finding an Amazon Japan listing for this. Really want the old ones in my collection in the long run, but this is awesome for now.

[]: Re: CRC Softcover reissue             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Mon Apr 15, 2019 7:34 pm Ahhhh. I saw this on my news feed and the stupid automatic translation made me think they changed their mind and were releasing the 3.0 CRC prematurely.

[]: Re: CRC Softcover reissue             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Tue Apr 16, 2019 8:09 pm https://www.amazon.co.jp/gp/aw/d/490503 ... UTF8&psc=1 Ready for preorder.

[]: Re: CRC Softcover reissue             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Apr 22, 2019 11:33 pm Oh, lemme copy/paste my reply in here from another thread, since the other books are getting releases: Sailor Star Dust wrote: 2.0 Complete Records Collection visual story version (similar to that softcover 1.0 book about to be released): Summer 2019 2.0 Complete Records Collection setting documents version: Summer 2019 and yep, 3.0 Complete Records Collection setting documents version: date pending Cool that the Q CRC is finally happening though, since they previously said it would be announced closer to when Shin Eva's out! Probably means whatever material is in it they didn't include in Shin Eva, I'd wager.

[]: Re: CRC Softcover reissue             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Apr 23, 2019 11:22 am The originally published 1.0 CRC was just a single volume, and not split in two like the 2.0 CRC, so that makes sense I suppose.

[]: Re: CRC Softcover reissue             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Apr 23, 2019 2:20 pm Ahh, I see. I wonder if these CRC softcovers mean an English release could be likely down the road? (Would be super cool!) Udon and VIZ have been releasing/eventually releasing some pretty cool Eva books, recently.

[]: Re: CRC Softcover reissue             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Tue Jun 18, 2019 12:14 am https://www.khara.co.jp/2019/06/17/ev02_zenkiroku/ ∆ The two 2.0 books. Come out july. No amazon Japan entry yet. Edit: Amazon Japan has them now, found under the same names they have in the khara link above.

[]: Re: CRC Softcover reissue             Quote Post by robersora » Tue Jun 18, 2019 8:47 am Is there any way we can any American publisher know that we really want those in a language I understand? I mean, especially when the one for 3.0 comes, I'm dying to know the thought process of what lead to that movie.

[]: Re: CRC Softcover reissue             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Tue Jun 18, 2019 10:04 am I don't know too much about English publishers. I've often communicated with Spanish publishers on twitter. Maybe Dark Horse would fit something like this?... Sadly I don't see something like this coming out in Spain anytime soon (hopefully the Netflix release contributes to changing that).
